metadata.name: Alien Gods (Glowing)
metadata.author: Stahlregen & fiShbRaiN + Geiss + Optics
metadata.source: Stahlregen & fiShbRaiN + Geiss + Optics - Alien Gods (Glowing).milk

perFrameCode: wave_g = .1 * max(5 * mid * sin(mid * time) / (mid_att * mid_att + mid * mid), .1);
wave_r = max(5 * treb * sin(treb * time) / (treb_att * treb_att + treb * treb), .3);
perPixelCode: zoom = if(below(rad, .03), .9, 1 - 2 * (-(3/2) * pow(2.718, sin(bass * bass * time * sin(31.4 * rad) / rad)) + .5 * pow(2.718, sin(treb * treb * time * rad * sin(3.14 * rad) / rad)))/500);
